---
title: "test_empire_infrastructure.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\contracts\test_empire_infrastructure.py"
loc: 37
complexity: 2
logic_score: 3.75
style_score: 3.90
intel_score: 7.89
overall_score: 4.93
---

## Intent
The `test_empire_infrastructure.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestEmpireInfrastructure, setUp, test_compilation_to_ir, test_symbol_resolution, test_boilerplate_generation. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestEmpireInfrastructure, setUp, test_compilation_to_ir, test_symbol_resolution, test_boilerplate_generation. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [unittest](file://unittest)
- [compiler](file://compiler)
- [symbolic_legend](file://symbolic_legend)
- [tempfile](file://tempfile)

### Exports
- `TestEmpireInfrastructure`
- `setUp`
- `test_compilation_to_ir`
- `test_symbol_resolution`
- `test_boilerplate_generation`
